notes: Focused subset hand-authored from Vonage's official SMS API OpenAPI 3.0.0 spec (v1.5.1). The adaptor only calls sendSMS -> POST /sms/json (application/x-www-form-urlencoded). The official spec exposes /sms/{format}; modeled the concrete /sms/json path. api_secret is added as a request body field to match how the OpenFn adaptor passes credentials, even though the official spec omits it (it declares basicAuth). Added /account/get-balance for a second seed collection. Response field names are hyphenated strings.
